audit.chain_algorithm: h0 = 64*'0'; h_i = sha256(hex(h_{i-1}) + record_i.hash) over records in file order. NOTE: TAAR seals each record individually (sha256 of canonical JSON minus 'hash'); this chain head is computed BY THIS BUNDLE over the ordered seals, it is not an upstream TAAR feature.

denials.reasons: SECRET evidence from workflow-reader requires a declared secret-handling writer
SECRET evidence from workflow-secret-reader requires a declared secret-handling writer

cleanliness_receipt.note: All TAAR runtime state stayed under the facility. The Beginnings tree was clean after the E2E run (verified before bundle creation); at receipt time its only delta is this bundle directory itself. The read-only upstream source was untouched.

passes.description: seed facility, plant inputs, drive 21 readers then 22 writers

passes.command: uv run python -m taar.cli run phantom-reader --repo <facility>; uv run python -m taar.cli run phantom-report-writer --repo <facility>
uv run python -m taar.cli workflows classify|scan|harden --repo <facility>
passes.description: Workflow Guardian CLI (read-only; classify=SECRET, scan exit 1 on critical findings by design)

planted_inputs.secret: fake ghp_ token in config_backup.py (sha256 in redaction section)

redaction.planted_input_file: config_backup.py (facility input; deliberately NOT in this bundle)
